instructions.instruction: When a task arrives, identify the matching skill from the tables below and **name it explicitly as the next skill to use** before responding further. Generated artifacts (YARD docs, Postman collections, READMEs) must be in **English** unless the user explicitly requests another language.
instructions.original_snippets: When a task arrives, identify the matching skill from the tables below and **name it explicitly as the next skill to use** before responding further. Generated artifacts (YARD docs, Postman collections, READMEs) must be in **English** unless the user explicitly requests another language.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger skill-router.

instructions.instruction: When multiple skills could apply: TDD → Planning → Domain discovery → Process (refactor-code) → Domain implementation (rails-\*, ruby-\*). Use plan-tests when the first failing spec is not obvious.
instructions.original_snippets: When multiple skills could apply: TDD → Planning → Domain discovery → Process (refactor-code) → Domain implementation (rails-\*, ruby-\*). Use plan-tests when the first failing spec is not obvious.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger skill-router.

instructions.instruction: > **Match:** Vague request, no clear skill. Use fallback: load context first.
instructions.original_snippets: > **Match:** Vague request, no clear skill. Use fallback: load context first.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger skill-router.

instructions.instruction: > **Match:** Multi-concern changeset. Load context, then decompose into appropriate review skills.

instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger skill-router.
